description: Historically one of the most influential Mafia clans in Sicily, based in Ciaculli and Croceverde Giardini near Palermo. Founded in the late 19th century, the extended family played a key role in the Sicilian Cosa Nostra, with members serving as secretaries of the Sicilian Mafia Commission. Involved in citrus growing, cigarette smuggling, heroin trafficking, and money laundering. Declined in the 2000s but remains active with strong influence.

country_links.evidence_quote: its criminal presence emerged into Calabria in the late 1990s
country_links.context: The Greco clan emerged in Calabria in the late 1990s, establishing a criminal presence there.
